title: Refresh page after confirming payment received

requirements.text: After the user clicks the 'Confirm Payment Received' button (or equivalent payment confirmation action) in the OrderForm component, trigger a full page reload (window.location.reload()) so the app resets to its initial state.

quotes: After confirm payment received, refresh the page

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the payment confirmation button causes the page to fully reload.
After reload, the app is in its initial empty state (no cart items, no order in progress).
The reload happens after any confirmation feedback or success state is shown to the user.

nonGoals: Changing the payment confirmation flow logic beyond adding the page refresh.
Clearing localStorage manually before reload (the reload itself resets in-memory state; localStorage is managed by existing hooks).
